message.content:
Fix TypeScript errors in the AstroLab mobile app offer screens. Read each file before editing.

The Badge component accepts `label` prop (string), NOT `children`. When screens use `<Badge variant="success">Text</Badge>`, change to `<Badge variant="success" label="Text" />`.

## Fix 1: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\offers\index.tsx`

Find where Badge is used with children pattern:
```tsx
<Badge variant={status.variant}>{status.label}</Badge>
```
Change to:
```tsx
<Badge variant={status.variant} label={status.label} />
```

## Fix 2: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\offers\[offerId].tsx`

Find where Badge is used with children pattern:
```tsx
<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'}>
  {isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'}
</Badge>
```
Change to:
```tsx
<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'} label={isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'} />
```

## Fix 3: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\offer\[token].tsx`

Same Badge fix:
```tsx
<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'}>
  {isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'}
</Badge>
```
Change to:
```tsx
<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'} label={isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'} />
```

Read all files before editing!

content.text: I'll read all three files first, then apply the fixes.
All three files read. Now I'll apply all three fixes in parallel.

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi

content.text:
All three fixes have been applied. Here is a summary of the changes:

**Fix 1** - `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\offers\index.tsx` (line 107):
- Changed `<Badge variant={status.variant}>{status.label}</Badge>` to `<Badge variant={status.variant} label={status.label} />`

**Fix 2** - `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\offers\[offerId].tsx` (lines 80-82):
- Changed the 3-line children pattern to `<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'} label={isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'} />`

**Fix 3** - `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\offer\[token].tsx` (lines 83-85):
- Changed the 3-line children pattern to `<Badge variant={isUsed ? 'neutral' : isExpired ? 'error' : 'success'} label={isUsed ? 'Utilisee' : isExpired ? 'Expiree' : 'Active'} />`

All three files now use the `label` prop instead of passing text as `children` to the `Badge` component, which matches the component's expected API.
